findings.issue: IRT 3PL parameters (a, b, c) are guessed, not calibrated from real data
findings.recommended_fix: Recalibrate parameters using real assessment data to minimize SEM impact

findings.issue: Insufficient question pool size for reliable theta estimation (less than 30 questions per competency)
findings.recommended_fix: Increase question pool size to at least 30 questions per competency for reliable CAT differentiation and theta estimation

findings.issue: No visible DIF analysis for AZ/CIS test-takers
findings.recommended_fix: Conduct DIF analysis to detect potential biases against AZ/CIS test-takers and adjust the assessment engine accordingly

findings.issue: SE threshold may not be appropriate
findings.recommended_fix: Re-evaluate and adjust the SE threshold to ensure accurate assessment termination
Update temporal decay rationale with evidence-based research to ensure validity and fairness
